title: Fix stopped canister — redeploy backend to restore getAllCases

requirements.text: Redeploy the backend canister (3m4vr-hiaaa-aaaac-ba7sa-cai) so it is running and can handle query calls. The canister is currently stopped (IC0508), which causes getAllCases and all other backend methods to return Reject code 5. The redeployment must restore the canister to a started state without data loss.

quotes: Canister 3m4vr-hiaaa-aaaac-ba7sa-cai is stopped and therefore does not have a CallContextManager

acceptanceCriteria: The backend canister is in a running (started) state after deployment.
Calling getAllCases returns a valid response (not Reject code 5).
The Cases page loads without a 'Failed to load cases' error.
Existing case data is preserved after redeployment.

requirements.text: Display a user-friendly error message on the Cases page when the backend is unreachable or returns a canister-stopped error, instead of showing raw rejection details. The message should read 'Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.' and include a Retry button that re-fetches the cases.
acceptanceCriteria: When getAllCases fails with a canister error, the Cases page shows 'Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.' instead of raw error details.
A Retry button is visible in the error state and triggers a re-fetch of cases when clicked.
The raw rejection/IC error text is not exposed to the user.

constraints: Do not drop or reset existing canister state (surgery cases and user profiles must be preserved).
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the backend data model or adding new API methods.
Migrating to a different canister ID.
